sentences.en: Let's brush our teeth together.
sentences.zh: 我們一起刷牙吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets brʌʃ ˈaʊɚ tiθ təˈɡeðɚ/

sentences.en: Try one more bite of carrots.
sentences.zh: 再吃一口紅蘿蔔試試看。
sentences.ipa: /traɪ wʌn mɔr baɪt ʌv ˈkerəts/

sentences.en: Let's wash your hair with shampoo.
sentences.zh: 我們用洗髮精洗頭髮吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets wɑʃ jʊɚ her wɪð ʃæmˈpu/

sentences.en: Buckle up, we're heading to the zoo.
sentences.zh: 繫上安全帶，我們要去動物園囉。
sentences.ipa: /ˈbʌkl ʌp wɪɚ ˈhedɪŋ tu ðə zu/

sentences.en: Wait your turn for the swing.
sentences.zh: 盪鞦韆要等輪到你。
sentences.ipa: /wet jʊɚ tɝn fɔr ðə swɪŋ/

sentences.en: What did you learn at school today?
sentences.zh: 你今天在學校學了什麼？
sentences.ipa: /wʌt dɪd ju lɝn æt skul təˈde/

sentences.en: Can you spell this word for me?
sentences.zh: 你可以拼出這個單字給我聽嗎？
sentences.ipa: /kæn ju spel ðɪs wɝd fɔr mi/

sentences.en: It's your brother's turn to play now.
sentences.zh: 現在輪到哥哥玩了。
sentences.ipa: /ɪts jʊɚ ˈbrʌðɚz tɝn tu ple naʊ/

sentences.en: Take a deep breath and calm down.
sentences.zh: 深呼吸，冷靜下來。
sentences.ipa: /tek ə dip breθ ənd kɑm daʊn/

sentences.en: If you throw toys, they'll be put away.
sentences.zh: 如果你亂丟玩具，它們就會被收起來。
sentences.ipa: /ɪf ju θro tɔɪz ðel bi pʊt əˈwe/

sentences.en: You worked so hard on that.
sentences.zh: 你在那件事上很努力。
sentences.ipa: /ju wɝkt so hɑrd ɑn ðæt/

sentences.en: Always wear your helmet when biking.
sentences.zh: 騎腳踏車一定要戴安全帽。
sentences.ipa: /ˈɔlwez wer jʊɚ ˈhelmɪt wen ˈbaɪkɪŋ/

sentences.en: Open your mouth so the doctor can look.
sentences.zh: 張開嘴巴讓醫生看看。
sentences.ipa: /ˈopən jʊɚ maʊθ so ðə ˈdɑktɚ kæn lʊk/

sentences.en: Give Auntie a big hug hello.
sentences.zh: 給阿姨一個大大的擁抱打招呼。
sentences.ipa: /ɡɪv ˈænti ə bɪɡ hʌɡ heˈlo/

sentences.en: It's nice to make new friends.
sentences.zh: 交新朋友是件好事。
sentences.ipa: /ɪts naɪs tu mek nu frendz/

sentences.en: Cover your mouth when you cough.
sentences.zh: 咳嗽時要摀住嘴巴。
sentences.ipa: /ˈkʌvɚ jʊɚ maʊθ wen ju kɔf/

sentences.en: Don't forget your umbrella, it might rain.
sentences.zh: 別忘了帶傘，可能會下雨。
sentences.ipa: /dont fɚˈɡet jʊɚ ʌmˈbrelə ɪt maɪt ren/

sentences.en: Time to put the tablet away now.
sentences.zh: 現在該把平板收起來了。
sentences.ipa: /taɪm tu pʊt ðə ˈtæblət əˈwe naʊ/

sentences.en: Let's decorate the house for the party.
sentences.zh: 我們來裝飾房子準備派對吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets ˈdekɚet ðə haʊs fɔr ðə ˈpɑrti/

sentences.en: Let's read one more page before bed.
sentences.zh: 睡前我們再讀一頁吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets rid wʌn mɔr pedʒ bɪˈfɔr bed/
